zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan of England Queen of Sicily於1165年出生在法國帕斯 德 拉 洛易麥-吉洛易安格斯時，她的父親Henry II King of England32歲，母親Aliénor d'Aquitaine Reine de France puis Reine d'Angleterre43歲。她於1177年2月13日與Guillaume de Sicile II在義大利西西利亞巴勒莫結婚。她去世於1199年4月9日在法國帕斯 德 拉 洛易麥-吉洛易豐特福勞爾吉利阿巴易享年34歲，埋葬在法國帕斯 德 拉 洛易麥-吉洛易豐特福勞爾吉利阿巴易。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joan of England Queen of Sicily于1165年出生在法国帕斯 德 拉 洛易麥-吉洛易安格斯时，她的父亲Henry II King of England32岁，母亲Aliénor d'Aquitaine Reine de France puis Reine d'Angleterre43岁。她于1177年2月13日与Guillaume de Sicile II在意大利西西利亞巴勒莫结婚。她去世于1199年4月9日在法国帕斯 德 拉 洛易麥-吉洛易豐特福勞爾吉利阿巴易享年34岁，埋葬在法国帕斯 德 拉 洛易麥-吉洛易豐特福勞爾吉利阿巴易。

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: possibly a metonymic occupational name for a fisherman, from orfe, a species of freshwater fish. Alternatively, a habitational name from Urff near Kassel, formerly Orpha.

nameMeanings.name: England
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Middle English Engelond ‘England’. It was probably a formal alternative to English , which is also well evidenced as a surname in England. These names may have been acquired by English landowners who moved in Norman social circles or who lived in a neighbouring country (Scotland, Wales, or Ireland), or by English merchants who traded abroad.
Norwegian: habitational name from any of various farmsteads so named, from Old Norse eng ‘meadow’ + land ‘land’.
Swedish: ornamental name with the same meaning as 2.

variants.name: English
meanings: English, Scottish, and Welsh: ethnic name from Middle English English, Inglish, Inglis ‘English’ (Old English Englisc), sometimes alternating with Anglo-Norman French Engleis, Engles, Anglais, Angles (Old French Englois). Compare Inglis and England . Among the aristocracy and upper gentry it marked out a man of English ancestry from one of Norman or continental origin. In counties bordering England with Scotland and Wales the name distinguished an Englishman from a Scot or a native Welshman on both sides of the border. The name may also have been acquired by English merchants who traded abroad or who lived and worked in a ‘French’ borough in England (one exclusively administered by Normans).
Irish: in Ireland, this name was used to denote an Englishman, often being adopted for Irish Aingléis ‘Englishman’ or through mistranslation for Mac an Ghallóglaigh, see Gallogly and Golightly .

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

en.lifeSummary: When Joan of England Queen of Sicily was born in 1165, in Angers, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, France, her father, Henry II King of England, was 32 and her mother, Aliénor d'Aquitaine Reine de France puis Reine d'Angleterre, was 43. She married Guillaume de Sicile II on 13 February 1177, in Palermo, Sicily, Italy. She died on 9 April 1199, in Fontevrault-l'Abbaye, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, France, at the age of 34, and was buried in Fontevrault-l'Abbaye, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan of England Queen of Sicily est née en 1165, à Angers, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, France, son père, Henry II King of England, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Aliénor d'Aquitaine Reine de France puis Reine d'Angleterre, avait 43 ans. Elle a épousé Guillaume de Sicile II le 13 février 1177, à Palermo, Sicile, Italie. Elle est décédée le 9 avril 1199, à Fontevrault-l'Abbaye, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, France, à l’âge de 34 ans, et a été enterrée à Fontevrault-l'Abbaye, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joan of England Queen of Sicily 1165 in Angers, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Henry II King of England 32 und ihre Mutter Aliénor d'Aquitaine Reine de France puis Reine d'Angleterre 43. Sie hat am 13. Februar 1177 in Palermo, Sizilien, Italien Guillaume de Sicile II geheiratet. Sie starb am 9. April 1199 im Alter von 34 Jahren in Fontevrault-l'Abbaye, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, Frankreich und wurde in Fontevrault-l'Abbaye, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joan of England Queen of Sicily è nata il nel 1165 nel Angers, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, Francia, sua padre, Henry II King of England, aveva 32 anni e sua madre, Aliénor d'Aquitaine Reine de France puis Reine d'Angleterre, aveva 43 anni. Lei sposato Guillaume de Sicile II il 13 febbraio 1177, nel Palermo, Sicilia, Italia. Morì il 9 aprile 1199, nel Fontevrault-l'Abbaye, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, Francia, all'età di 34 anni, e fu sepolta a Fontevrault-l'Abbaye, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Joan of England Queen of Sicilyが1165年にフランスペイズ ド ラ ロイアーメインエ-エト-ロイアーアンジャーズで生まれた時，父Henry II King of Englandは32歳，母Aliénor d'Aquitaine Reine de France puis Reine d'Angleterreは43歳であった。1177年2月13日にイタリアシシリアプアラーモでGuillaume de Sicile IIと結婚した。彼女は1199年4月9日にフランスペイズ ド ラ ロイアーメインエ-エト-ロイアーフォンテvラウルト-ル'アッバイで34歳で死去し，フランスペイズ ド ラ ロイアーメインエ-エト-ロイアーフォンテvラウルト-ル'アッバイにて埋葬された。

ko.Abaye de Fontevrault, Fontevraud L'Abbay: 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 맹-트-로이르 폰테브라트-'압베이
ko.lifeSummary: Joan of England Queen of Sicily(이)가 1165년 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 맹-트-로이르 앤그르스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Henry II King of England(은)는 32세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Aliénor d'Aquitaine Reine de France puis Reine d'Angleterre(은)는 43세였다. 그녀는 1177년 2월 13일 이탈리아 시실리야 파일모에서 Guillaume de Sicile II(와)과 결혼했다. 그녀는 1199년 4월 9일 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 맹-트-로이르 폰테브라트-'압베이에서 34세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 맹-트-로이르 폰테브라트-'압베이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joan of England Queen of Sicily nasceu em 1165, em Angers, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, França, seu pai, Henry II King of England, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Aliénor d'Aquitaine Reine de France puis Reine d'Angleterre, tinha 43 anos. Ela casou-se com Guillaume de Sicile II em 13 de fevereiro de 1177, em Palermo, Sicilia, Itália. Ela faleceu em 9 de abril de 1199, em Fontevrault-l'Abbaye, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, França, com 34 anos, e foi sepultada em Fontevrault-l'Abbaye, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, França.

ru.Fontevrault-l'Abbaye, Maine-et-Loire, Pa: фонтевраулт-л'аббеи, меине-ет-лоир, пеис де ла лоир, Франция
ru.Angers, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire: ангирс, меине-ет-лоир, пеис де ла лоир, Франция
ru.Abaye de Fontevrault, Fontevraud L'Abbay: фонтевраулт-л'аббеи, меине-ет-лоир, пеис де ла лоир, Франция
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan of England Queen of Sicily родилась в 1165 г. в местности ангирс, меине-ет-лоир, пеис де ла лоир, Франция, её отцу по имени Henry II King of England было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Aliénor d'Aquitaine Reine de France puis Reine d'Angleterre, 43. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Guillaume de Sicile II 13 февраля 1177 г. в местности пеилирмо, сисиля, Италия. Она умерла 9 апреля 1199 г. в местности фонтевраулт-л'аббеи, меине-ет-лоир, пеис де ла лоир, Франция в возрасте 34 лет и была похоронена в местности фонтевраулт-л'аббеи, меине-ет-лоир, пеис де ла лоир, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Joan of England Queen of Sicily nació en 1165, en Angers, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, Francia, su papá, Henry II King of England, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Aliénor d'Aquitaine Reine de France puis Reine d'Angleterre, tenía 43 años. Se casó con Guillaume de Sicile II el 13 de febrero de 1177, en Palermo, Sicilia, Italia. Murió el 9 de abril de 1199, en Fontevrault-l'Abbaye, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, Francia, a la edad de 34 años, y fue sepultada en Fontevrault-l'Abbaye, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, Francia.
